sample_comments.text: Phía trước có KS đang xây dựng gần xong, bị hạn chế tầm nhìn ra biển nhưng vẫn có view biển chếch và đi bộ ra biển khá gần. Nhân viên KS rất dễ thương, đồ ăn sáng ổn, sạch sẽ, có xe đưa đón Hội An, An Bàng theo khung giờ.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe King Room, Ocean/Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời !
sample_comments.positives: Bãi biển tiện, sạch đẹp. Bể bơi rộng, đẹp. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, thân thiện. Tôi sẽ giới thiệu bạn bè tới đây và sẽ quay lại vào dịp du lịch sau
sample_comments.negatives: Hơi ồn vì công trình bên cạnh đang thi công

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text: Ngoài vị trí và cảnh đẹp ra, mọi thứ đều thật sự tuyệt vời. Nơi ở thoải mái, nhân viên thân thiện, bữa sáng hợp lý và giá cả cũng rất rẻ. sample_comments.title: Staff do their best + Quality Breakfast but Noisy Building
sample_comments.positives: We booked a suite but didn't quite like its location inside the hotel, asked if we can change and got a really good corner room (slight downgrade but that was completely fine for us) with a great view to rice fields. The lady who checked us in and changed our room was very nice and helpful, she even tried and succeeded to put some good and quiet neighbors in a nearby room after we complained about noise from the previous ones (see below). We could breath without an issue, there is ventilation and no bad smell. It was a good change and we could heal after coming from another place which had moldy smell. Laundry service was good and not too expensive. The breakfast was really really good, it felt like every single item and even ingredient was the best possible quality, it is a kind of breakfast you don't want to miss
sample_comments.negatives: It says soundproof, but it is not soundproof in any way. It looks like it was some other hotel which was bought by Wyndham, and the original builders didn't know anything about soundproofing at all. There is a large enough hole left beneath the entrance door after closing it. Windows are single layer, the worst thing is that there are holes inside the "wall" between your and your neighbors balcony, I wonder who was the genius to design it like that. You can put your hand inside these holes and shake hands with your neighbor. They can also see your room from their balcony through these holes so you just have to keep curtains partly closed. If someone is sitting on their balcony and talking, nearby rooms will hear them even with their windows closed. The floor is tiles, so when someone drags furniture even below your room, you will hear it. The walls are even "better", we had only one neighbor room, we heard they came late night to their room, and some dude began to roar like a tiger, then went to the balcony and started talking, after that we could hear them showering and constantly hitting something in their bathroom, after they checked out we heard the staff repairing something in that room after their stay which is hilarious. As mentioned above - after they left, we got some quiet neighbors we barely heard, but still, it is more of a problem of hotel "soundproofing" than the guests themselves, the building is poorly designed in that regard, but at least staff try their best to make your life easier.

Beside that the hotel is pretty old, although the room was spacious but with a lot of ants. Pool was small as ND crowded.

sample_comments.title: Better to stay at other hotel
sample_comments.text:
We had high hopes for this stay because the place itself was nice and the rooms looked decent upon arrival. Unfortunately, the service completely ruined the experience.

There was a small bathroom mirror that appeared to be poorly installed. The moment my friend entered the bathroom, the mirror suddenly fell and shattered. Thankfully, no one was injured but it could have easily caused serious harm. We planned to report it after breakfast, but when we returned to our room, housekeeping had already entered and removed the broken mirror without informing us.

When we later reported the incident, we were told that we would be held liable for the damage because they "couldn't determine whether it was intentional or not." That response was honestly shocking. Why would any guest intentionally break a mirror in their own room? Instead of showing concern about a potential safety hazard due to improper installation, they immediately assumed liability on our part.

To make matters worse, we also availed of their laundry service. Several of our white clothes came back with visible stains. When we reported this, their only explanation was, "Maybe there was something wrong with your other clothes that caused the stains." There was no accountability, no effort to properly inspect the issue, and no offer of a solution.

The property itself may look nice, but service and guest safety matter more. Unfortunately, based on our experience, both were handled poorly.

I would not set foot in the 'fitness' area - it is in the basement with no windows or air. Really grungy.
The 'ocean view' is over a farmers field with cows and just behind the huge new Marriot they are building on the beach which I am told will take 3 years of hammering. It is a long walk to the beach but you can see a glimpse of it if you have a room on the front, but then you have the noise, not only construction but loudspeaker selling something at all hours of the night. The location is very far from the Old Town and taxis are expensive. The hotel does not provide shuttles. The breakfast was good.

sample_comments.title: Misleading Property Listing - Avoid
sample_comments.text:
Our experience at Wyndham Garden Hoi An Cua Dai Beach was far below expectations and largely driven by misleading information.

The listing promoted key features including an "infinity pool with panoramic sea views," "private beach," "supervised kids' pool," and "rooftop ocean-view dining." None of these were actually available.

These are not minor discrepancies---they are core selling points and directly influenced our booking decision.

Service and hygiene were also concerning:

Extremely limited vegetarian/vegan breakfast despite repeated requests

Constant sleep disruption due to roosters from neighbouring properties (around 3am daily)

One meal contained a piece of steel wool---this is a serious hygiene concern. The staff response was casual, with no proper apology or acknowledgment of the risk

Poor housekeeping standards (basic items like body wash not refilled for 4 guests over 5 nights)

Overall, this stay did not meet basic expectations of accuracy, hygiene, or service.

The only positives were the convenient location and one standout staff member, Vivian, who genuinely tried to help.

sample_comments.text: Not the best location, breakfast is so-so, rooms are very clean, staff is very friendly, do not get them to book you any extra services/tours/taxis, do it on your own it's way cheaper
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Klee,
Thank you very much for spent 07 nights to stay with us here and taking your time to share your experiences with others
We are delight that you enjoyed our room and your compliment regarding staff.
We are so sorry as our hotel location and the price of tours/ transportation are not as your choise. We are on the Cua Dai beach, its a main beach of Hoi An and is just take 05 minutes by Car to the Hoi An town. We are alway offer best services to all our guest here compare to outside services.
Once, again thank you very much and we hope to welcome you back next time
Best regards,
Tuan Tran
Front Office Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Ocean or Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Relaxing holiday retreat with amazing staff.
sample_comments.positives:
The location was prefect, right next to the beach with free access to the beach club. Old town was only a 10 minute ride away. 
The pool was lovely and big, with decent amount of beds. 
Buffet breakfast was very extensive and delicious. 
The best part about this hotel was the staff, they were amazing and so lovely and helpful. Especially Sunny who helped me book some tours and handled most of my stay.
sample_comments.negatives: The only downside was that the restaurant food for dinner was a bit overpriced for the quality.

sample_comments.title: Rooms and service fine
sample_comments.text: Nice room and nice service. I just can't recommend it cause the location isn't the best, the sea view from room obstructed by a half completed new development which is distracting to any serenity. Everything is always related to price, so I feel for the money there is much better accomodations to be had. It's unfortunate that there is new construction across the street obscuring the view, but I can't leave a review and pretend I didn't notice it. Didn't see or hear about any nice restaurants or local restaurants nearby either. Breakfast buffet is fine though. Room clean and lovely.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Frank,
We very much appreciate your comments regarding your stay at Wyndham Garden Hoi An.
Your feedback is extremely valuable to us, as we strive to improve with each and every stay.
We look forward to being of service to you again and hope to better meet your expectations in the future.
Best regards,
Jackie/FOM

sample_comments.title: Good resort property away from the noise
sample_comments.positives: Good facilities away from the Old Town and close to the beach. Wonderful staff and good outdoor pool.
sample_comments.negatives: Rooms are a bit dated but still very decent. Walls are a bit thin.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel but not quite in the location we thought. Most definitely not 10 meters from the beach!
sample_comments.text: Nice place but nowhere near a decent beach. While a shuttle bus is made available for hotel patrons the nearest decent beach is 3 kms away. Bar and dining room a bit pricey by Vietnam standards however a very good breakfast. Really friendly and helpful staff.
sample_comments.response:
Dear David, 

Your Little Beach family are pleased you enjoyed your stay with us. We want you to feel welcomed, relaxed, and happy from the moment you arrive in Hoian.

We will let our team know your satisfaction about breakfast and our staff's friendliness. 

About the beach, we would like to inform that our hotel is Beach area hotel, not Beach front hotel. We work very hard to deliver the best Hoi An holiday experience in our hotel

We hope to see you again at our hotel in near future. 

Best regards, 

Rose (Ms.)

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The staff were so kind, attentive and friendly. We had a wonderful spa treatment.Bike use was great!

sample_comments.title: Not on the beach. No view whatsoever
sample_comments.text: Staff was lovely and shuttle services were convenient. However location is not so great. It was disappointing as room was facing a main road with no view to the beach across the road. Breakfast was delicious and staff very warm and friendly

sample_comments.title: Excellent! Shuttle service is an added bonus.
sample_comments.positives: Everything was good, staff is exceptional, breakfast was wonderful.
sample_comments.negatives: The contruction across the street can be a turn off if you take a sea veiw room (even on higher floor).

sample_comments.title: Ok but not but not worth the rating of 9.4 .
sample_comments.text: A clean & tidy hotel. Reception staff excellent. Bar staff tend to go missing at happy hour, buy one get one free, second free drink you constantly trying to find staff. When happy hour finished plenty of staff available. Room staff had to ask 3 times for more soap & toilet paper. The room average had a ocean view, yes overlooked ocean but also a building site , not quite what the pictures show. The beach out front terrible & the pool & facilities on the beach in state of disrepair . The pool was green. Breakfast & meals of a good standard , coffee hit & miss depended on who made it . At $11 Aust dollars for 2 coffees, sent 3 coffees back not able to be drank. Everything attracts 15% tax & service charge on top of cost. So meals & drinks with 15% on top of already inflated prices are quite expensive . Top restaurants in Old town a lot cheaper & quality better. The Gym was good & internet good . Pool at resort excellent. Stayed 7 days rate it about 7.5.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: I had a nice beautiful ocean front balcony. Some nights, I could hear the roar of the waves soothing me to sleep. They had daily activities at the hotel to experience. Linda did a great job conducting the Vietnamese language class. We had fun and I learned a lot. Sunny was everything! Sunny helped with arranging tours, airline flights, arranged a private tour for me, was full of helpful information and advice. The entire staff was always smiling, pleasant, friendly, considerate and helpful. The hotel was beautiful and always very clean. They have free bikes for guests to take and ride, they have a full free daily breakfast buffet, a spa where I enjoyed a full hour massage with additional pedicure, and guests have a 1-day pass for access to the beach club across the street. Along with the hotel's restaurant menu, there is also a nice, Vietnamese family owned restaurant next door to the hotel.
sample_comments.negatives: Although you can walk/ride through the neighborhood, It isn't close to the walkable business area near Ancient Town. However, if you prefer your lodging to be away from the activity, you're only a 10 ride when you're ready to indulge.

sample_comments.title: Not 5* property
sample_comments.text: Staff is great. It is a good 3* hotel tho, looks cheapish. Simple furniture, quite used bed mattress... Breakfast was great. Overal u can get better in HoiAn
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe King Room, Ocean/Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: great for travellers who want to combine beach and sightseeing
sample_comments.positives: close to the beach, free of charge access to outside clubs, free bicycle usage, free downtown shuttle bus, friendly staff. spacious and clean rooms, free airport transport,
sample_comments.negatives: uninviting gym in the basement

sample_comments.title: Not good if you go with car
sample_comments.text:
Position: is far from center
Car parking: on the road( i don't have good feelling because many car and person went around overnight)
Beach view: have built new resort and very noise ( in day , i stay here it happen in 4 oclock AM and i can' sleep)
Food: not really like vietnam tranditional food(as my felling, i am Vietnamese people )
Room: is ok( they have a good room)
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Ocean or Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: The most welcoming team ever---felt like home with their constant support and genuine care!
sample_comments.positives:
I stayed here for a month, and it was great. The team is probably the most welcoming group I've come across. Super friendly, always happy to help, and ready to fix anything that came up right away.

They made me feel totally at home from day one, which is rare to find. It felt more like staying with family than at a hotel. If you're looking for a place with good vibes and awesome people, this is it!

sample_comments.title: Would have been perfect if ...
sample_comments.text:
The swimming pool was great, too bad the mixed-gender sauna was off-limits to guests, unless they paid VND 300k (in January 2026). That's an insane price to quote for a small sauna and steam room. 

The breakfast menu is okay and varied. Location is pretty good and central in Cua Dai area.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Very clean room and comfortable bed. Location is fantastic as you can go to the beach by simply crossing the street, and take a 10-minute taxi to old town.
sample_comments.negatives: Coffee machine was too slow. Orange juice was not natural. Guests should have the option of reserving bikes (instead of first-come, first-serve policy).

sample_comments.title: Everything was good except a broke coffee machine
sample_comments.text:
Coffee machine was broke . During breakfast when we asked they said it was broke and we had to use condensed milk.even fresh milk was not available .

Our friends stayed for two nights - even they faced this problem .how can a coffee machine be broke for two days and not rectify it ?

sample_comments.title: Very nice stay with everything we needed. Handy shuttle to the old town twice a day. Beach access across the street. We
sample_comments.positives: It was a lovely property with all the amenities. We liked the cleanliness, bikes, and the friendliness of the staff. Best sleeps we've had our whole trip. The breakfast was very good.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Economy
sample_comments.text: Great value and friendly staff The property offers excellent value for money with a friendly staff. While the location and cleanliness are average, the facilities are decent. The staff members were helpful and accommodating, contributing to a pleasant stay overall.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Sir/Madam,
Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us at Wyndham Garden Hoi An for your recent stay and taking time to share your amazing experience with us.
We are so happy to know that you enjoyed all aspects of our hotel and services
We hope to welcome you back in the near future.
Warm regards,
Wyndham Garden Hoi An Cua Dai Beach

sample_comments.title: Great option
sample_comments.positives: Really beautiful hotel and friendly, caring staff. Unfortunately wasted as the weather was terrible so couldn't take advantage of the beach or pool. In decent weather would have been stunning
sample_comments.negatives: We thought breakfast ended kind of early for our liking but we enjoy a lay in on holiday.

sample_comments.title: Nothing like expected
sample_comments.text: Pictures great, requested high floor because had a seaview premier room. Got a low floor, with a view of a construction site. Could not see the sea at all, should've got the cheaper pool view. Cf machine broken and ran out of tea for breakfast. Staff friendly though

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Friendly staff, great food and excellent facilities

sample_comments.title: Near to beach
sample_comments.text:
The hotel provide free bike for ride and the location near to beach just 5 min cycle. 

Our door have problem to close, has tell the housekeeper and fix it on 2nd day. 

They also have provide raining activity.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Chan,
Thank you for choosing Wyndham Garden Hoi An for your recent stay in Hoi An and thank you very much for taking time to share you review abouot our hotel.

We hope to welcome you back in the new future

Front Office Manager

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Very friendly and helpful staff, clean and specious room. Amazing breakfast, great spa.
sample_comments.negatives: Location is not perfect but taxi is always available and inexpensive

sample_comments.title: Old and saggy mattress but overall it was okay
sample_comments.text:
밑에 한국말로도 적엇어요
Stayed here for 6nights.
Mixed reviews on staff as some staff were extremely friendly and some werent. Especially the nail care lady (Lynh) did a really poor job on gel polish however she insisted that is because of my small nails thats why she had to paint over my fingers to look better? The manicure i had started tearing apart from the first night. I spend 1million dong(70 AUD) which wasnt cheap in Australia either for my nails and pedis, it was like 70 bucks down the drain.
We stayed at room 620, which was on the top floor. View was amazing, we really loved the view. However the guests next to our room constantly smoked in their balcony, the ciggarette smell came in to our room even when the balcony door closed which was disgusting.
The mattress definitely needs to be replaced as it sounds squeaky even with the small movement the the middle of the mattress was sagging. We couldnt have a good sleep in that bed. Later we thought we should have asked for a room change, regret we didnt.
We loved the shuttle bus, brekky and the gym downstaires. Next time if we stay here again, hoping that we dont stay next to either smokers or in the old mattress.
여기서 6박 7일 묵엇어요. 조식도 괜찮고 가격도 괜찮고 다 괜찮은데 일단 침대가 가운데가 푹꺼져서 너무 불편햇고 조금 움직일째마다 스프링 소리가 너무 많이 나서 무슨 귀곡 산장에 온것같은 느낌. 옆방에 사람들이 베란다서 하루 종일 담배를 펴서 담배냄새가 방안으로 다 들어왓고 베란다에 말려둔 티셔츠에 담배냄새가 뱃어요. 가격대비 괜찮은 호텔인데 다만 침대나 옆방 사람들담배필경우는 방 바꿔달라고 하시길 권해드려요.

sample_comments.title: Enjoyable experience with great spa services and a comfortable room. Wonderful breakfast buffet and delicious food optio
sample_comments.positives: Well maintained, beautifully decorated and friendly staff.
sample_comments.negatives: Not direct access to beach but across the street

sample_comments.title: Poor location great hotel and staff. Annoyed at paying seoerate city tax and service charges
sample_comments.text: Unclear pricing watch out for city tax and service charges up to 15% on top of bills...

sample_comments.title: Awesome trip. We would comeback and higly recommend to my friends and family.
sample_comments.positives: Pretty nice and neat design hotel with beautiful front garden and backyard. You will feel cooler around the pool-beach area during summer time. Staff are amazing especially Mr. Cameron ( F&B Manager ) is always be around to support you during breakfast.
sample_comments.negatives: NA

sample_comments.title: Good hotel with excellent staff
sample_comments.text:
The staff will do everything to help you and make your stay as comfortable as possible.
The building is build with little care about the noise, for example; when someone in another room moves a chair you can hear it screeching two rooms further. The window has single glass, on busy days you can hear the traffic erly in the morning.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: The staff in the hotel is very friendly and helpful . The swimming pool is also very nice

sample_comments.title: Highly Recommend this Hotel
sample_comments.text:
I loved my stay at this hotel.
I was given an upgraded room because my first room was facing the beach and there was a local celebration going on, so it was very noisy in my original room.
Both rooms and all the facilities were extremely clean.
The staff in all departments were very helpful, friendly and professional.
There was plenty of variety at breakfast which was very tasty.
I will definitely stay there again when l return to Hoi An.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe King Room, Garden/City View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Enjoyable and Relaxing.
sample_comments.positives: Stay was relaxing and enjoyable. The room was clean and comfortable. Staff were very friendly, eager to help and answer any questions. Lyli was exceptionally helpful. It was great having bikes available free of charge to bike up and down the beach road, through rice paddies and into Hoi An old town. Scooters are available to rent on the corner just two doors down from the hotel. The beach and beach club across the street was the perfect place to hang out and enjoy some local life.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: It wasn't as I expected!
sample_comments.text: From May 15, 2026. It was a two-day stay during a birthday trip for my wife as a couple. Many staff members were kind and made for a good atmosphere. However... it was far from the sea, and when we reserved a room on the ocean side, we experienced the rumbling and noise of a construction site right in front of us! There was also karaoke noise at night! On the second day, we asked to change rooms. The breakfast was delicious. The outdoor venue had a pool view and was beautiful, but the door was heavy and not automatic, which made it difficult for elderly guests to open and close it. As a result, due to the heat, everyone ended up retreating inside! There was also no smart TV, only local channels... The cost performance is definitely not good. Probably won't be coming back. I hope this is helpful.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe King Room, Ocean/Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Quiet beach close by
sample_comments.negatives: Expensive water

sample_comments.title: Hotel away from busy Hoi An
sample_comments.text: Quiet little hotel away from the bustling Hoi A town to catch a breather. Close distance to beach for a morning walk but the beach is not as clean as Danang of course. Good gym.
sample_comments.room_type: Family Suite, Connecting Door, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Very nice place at Cua Dai beach.
sample_comments.positives: Very clean and bright, about $60 USD. Laundry easy and quick. Airport pick up was easy and helpful. Breakfast was very good and had all the basics, fruit, pho and eggs etc. Also some very good pastries and fruit juices. A really nice stay.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: The bed is so soft until I sink into the mattress
sample_comments.room_type: Quadruple Family Room, Partial Ocean View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: fantastic find ! great value
sample_comments.positives: very clean, the hotel is older but well maintained ... the decor, the pool area, and sitting furniture was very well maintained. Excellent friendly staff. excellent breakfast!!

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: Goodnight
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe King Room, Garden/City View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Great place
sample_comments.positives: An excellent place friendly staff It's a home away from home Highly recommended for couples and families
sample_comments.negatives: Everything was exceptional

sample_comments.title: Awesome stay
sample_comments.text: I had an excellent stay at Wyndham Garden Hoi An Hotel. The facilities were well maintained, but the real highlight was the staff. In particular, Sue deserves special appreciation. She was full of energy, extremely helpful, and managed multiple responsibilities at different desks with ease and professionalism. Her ability to multitask while still ensuring every guest felt cared for truly enhanced the experience. Thanks to Sue and the entire team for making the stay so memorable. Highly recommended!
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Garden/City View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Staff were amazing. Sue was really helpful

sample_comments.title: Very nice and cosy hotel by the beach
sample_comments.text: We liked this hotel very much. 2 min walk to the beach, free shuttle bus the old town, a nice hotel pool area and very friendly and efficient staff. I highly recommend this hotel!
sample_comments.room_type: Family Quadruple Room Partial Ocean View With Balcony

sample_comments.title: We enjoyed our stay very much.
sample_comments.positives: Nice size room and comfortable bed. Great breakfast and friendly staff. We really enjoyed our stay there.

sample_comments.title: Excellent Hotel BUT....
sample_comments.text: The Hotel was very clean, well maintained and the pool was clean with fresh towels. Unfortunately my wife spent a challenging 3 days in Hoi An hospital which the Hotel knew about, which was of no fault of the Hotels. I requested specifically at reception that my younger teens be allowed to order food and drink as they needed while I attended hospital daily with my wife, yet upon them ordering food, it never arrived so they were forced to leave Hotel grounds to find food elsewhere which is what I did not want, whilst they did not need baby sitting, there is a global understanding regardless of culture that ones children are important and what I asked help for was not a big request. I expressed my disbelief to Hotel staff and also learned the food was still charged to my account. What made things more disappointing was upon my return daily I was never asked how my wife was, I was only hard sold their next dinner special or happy hour menu whilst trying to get to the elevator. Comparative to other restaurants the food was the most overpriced we had experienced from 7 hotels so far for no justifiable reason which explained the empty restaurant in the evening. So 2 star for reception and restaurant staff despite the bell boys and security team being excellent.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Garden/City View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Excellent hotel and the value can't be beat. Breakfast was huge with lots of options. Pool was very nice and in the sun most of the day. No problems finding chairs even though there are a limited number of chairs for a hotel this size. Staff were great - welcoming and very helpful. Rooms were a good size. Beds were comfortable. Views on the river side are good from the upper floors. Free shuttle to Hoi An three times a day. Gym was small but had an adequate amount of equipment. The beach is very nice and an easy walk across the street.
sample_comments.negatives: WiFi was sketchy and would disconnect quite a lot. This is something that they should remedy. Somewhat secluded which is good and bad. It was quiet but not many decent restaurants close by. We mostly went into Hoi An or to An Bang beach to eat at night. Closest half way decent grocery store is 800m away.

sample_comments.title: Ok but not efficient.
sample_comments.text:
PROS- nice staff, helpful and kind
Very close to cua dai beach. Beach was awesome.
Aircon was not in restaurant or lobby. Everything is left open letting in mozzies and extreme heat. Doesnt make sense have coolers with all windows and doors open. Tried to charge me for 2 waters when we only used one. Shuttle only goes at 10am and by that time its to hot. Also only 1 pickup time around 4pm. Gimmicks e.g. free movie and food but only to find out you have to purchase to get free. Didn't enjoy all that much. I'm sure theres better places. Kids did enjoy the pool. The gym was also decent. Restaurant was sub par in food. Breakfast was ok with rotated menu. The HiHo shop next door was amazing.

sample_comments.title: A wonderful hotel with high value for such luxury and class in Hoi An.
sample_comments.positives: I would rate this hotel as one of my top five of hotels I've stayed at throughout Asia. Impeccably maintained, stylish decor and tiling, the food was excellent, staff extra helpful and friendly.
sample_comments.negatives: Hard to find anything bad to say other than I wish the pillows had been softer. This is a common problem with hotel pillows.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing Stay
sample_comments.text: Wyndham Garden is a good choice for a relaxing stay, offering modern, clean rooms and friendly staff. While it's not very close to the old town, the peaceful setting and easy access to the beach more than make up for it
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Queen Ocean/Riverside View With Balcony

sample_comments.title: Home in Hoian!
sample_comments.positives:
We have stayed in this hotel previously as it always feels like "coming home". The staff is so very accommodating and friendly. Everyone from bell hops, front desk, management, dining room, cleaning etc will provide a smile and acknowledge you.. Love it
Breakfast buffet is very good
sample_comments.negatives: Having to leave! Could have stayed longer as we were so comfortable.

sample_comments.title: Quiet location near beach
sample_comments.text: Breakfast included was more than adequate nicely displayed & set out. Staff very helpful & always on hand to answer any questions
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Ocean or Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Everything was great.
sample_comments.negatives: The hotel could have done a better job of advertising events, tours and classes.

sample_comments.title: Nice place
sample_comments.text:
It was one of the better places we stayed 
Things worked and the staff very nice and accommodating

sample_comments.title: Great hotel away from busy An Hoi center.
sample_comments.positives: Great hotel, very comfortable beds, beautiful bathroom and helpful staff. Good breakfast. It felt luxurious for a very reasonable price.
sample_comments.negatives: Would have like more frequent shuttles from the beach.

sample_comments.title: Excellent hotel
sample_comments.text:
I visited the hotel on the Valentine's weekend. It was a beautiful hotel. The check in got a little delayed and we were not satisified with the room since the balcony view was obstructed as the room was on the 2nd floor.

The manager heard our grievance and managed to allocate another room on a higher floor. Though the room size was smaller comparitively, it met our requirement.

The staff is very friendly but a bit slow with the service. Not deducting any points for the slow service cause the location is dreamy and has a laid back vibe. There is some construction going on bang opposite to the hotel and the view from the balcony is not that pleasant.

The spa was wonderful and the masseuse was very courteous and skilled.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Arkaprava,

Wyndham Garden Hoi An do appreciate your value feedback to us. We hope have more chances to welcome you back to our hotel for more enjoyable moments.

Yours sincerely,
Steven Tran
On behalf of the Management
Wyndham Garden Hoi An Cua Dai Beach

sample_comments.title: Excellent stay with fair rates
sample_comments.positives: I liked the quiet location away from old town Hoi An. I like the swimming pool ambiance.
sample_comments.negatives: The breakfast needs to improve. Most of the food were cold and it was mostly catered to Westerners.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel with wonderful staff, but area is pretty run-down
sample_comments.text:
Pros: Nice roomy bathroom with large bathtub and lots of hot water, very comfortable bed and pillows, good A/C, decent buffet breakfast, staff is friendly and helpful, nice cotton robes.
Cons: Noise from road, and a nearby temple, tall uncomfortable stools on balcony and no table, went for a walk on the beach and returned with our feet coated in black, sticky tar.

sample_comments.title: Great place to stay if you are sightseeing in Hoi An!
sample_comments.positives: Nice pool and great staff! The breakfast buffet was great as well.
sample_comments.negatives: There was heavy construction going on across the street so our view was of a construction site.

sample_comments.title: Good enough
sample_comments.text: Good services and nice staff.

sample_comments.title: Nice atmosphere, clean and relax
sample_comments.positives: The staff are helpful, room is clean
sample_comments.negatives: Not well soundproofed, wifi was not strong

sample_comments.title: Very helpful staff but our experience wasn't as hoped.
sample_comments.text:
Naively this hotel wasn't on the beach as thought. The weather wasn't great and still coming out of the rainy season mid December so the beach club and beach over the road looked very dirty and unused. The pool at the hotel looked a bit tired but the weather meant we didn't get to use it anyway. 
Unluckily our room had an awful view over a kind of scrap yard, who made a horrendous noise about 9am on our first morning. Reception were very apologetic and said it would not happen again. The next morning the hotel were making noise mending their own roof above our room. So unfortunately not a perfect experience for us. 
On a positive, the hotel was very nice. Breakfast was great with lots of choice. Location wise, it was only a short taxi ride to the centre of Hoi An. The staff were very helpful. A great little restaurant next door to the hotel too.
sample_comments.room_type: Family Suite

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Excellent, clean, best shuttle to the beach and old town. Also to the airport. Nice location and easy access to local restaurant

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Very friendly housekeeping staff. The room was very clean. Breakfast was ok. It's weird that the shuttle bus that goes to the A Bang Beach actually goes to the Esco Beach which is a pricey bar/restaurant. Would recommend you to cross the street and check out the Club pool and the beach opposite the hotel.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: We received 5 star service at Wyndham Garden Hoi An. All the staff were simply amazing!! The rooms are nice and airy. There is construction noise from Mariott, but we were switched to the other end where we could hear the waves at night. Breakfast spread is expansive and of excellent quality. And the in-house Spa is exceptional, especially Dao! Thank you to the entire team for a memorable stay

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel
sample_comments.text: This was a great hotel and was very obliging- allowed early check-in and late check out. Also allowed us to swap transfer to return to airport instead of pick up. Free bikes were available and the pool was lovely. The family bunk was spacious with a great bath tub! Beach was 3 minutes away with a nice little cafe as well. My only grumble would be that the free shuttle only runs twice a day but at 3pm and 4pm - you cannot get in and out of town. We had to use a lot of grab taxi. Also breakfast was mediocre- a basic range of eggs but lacked bacon some days. The local dishes were nice but again quite limited. Restaurant was also quite pricey when you added plus plus.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Guest

sample_comments.title: A little disappointed
sample_comments.text:
Our stay at Wyndham Garden Hoi An had some bright spots, especially thanks to the fantastic staff, but also came with a few disappointments that might influence whether we'd return.

 Highlights
 • Staff & Service: The best part of our stay. The staff were top-notch---friendly, responsive, and helpful throughout our trip. Some spoke English well, and they made a great effort to accommodate requests, including arranging airport transport smoothly.
 • Comfort: The bed was very comfortable, and the room was clean and well maintained despite having an older, Spanish-style villa design.
 • Bathroom Setup: Nice shower and separate tub, good water pressure and temperature.

 What Could Be Improved
 • "Sea View" Misleading: The ocean view was underwhelming due to a construction site directly between the hotel and the beach, blocking the scenic appeal.
 • Noise Issues: Soundproofing was poor. We heard loud noises from outside and other rooms. One day there was an extremely loud speaker blaring nearby for hours.
 • Wi-Fi & Breakfast: Wi-Fi was functional but slow (under 100 Mbps). The breakfast was just okay---small omelets and oddly roasted bacon that didn't match American-style expectations.
 • Location: It's far from Hoi An Old Town, so we had to use Grab regularly (~78,000 VND per ride). It's not a walkable distance to the main attractions.
 • Odd Charge for Ice: We were surprised and confused that the hotel charged us when we simply requested ice for our room---something usually complimentary at most hotels.

 Other Notes
 • Amenities were fine and replenished upon request.
 • Rooms and bathrooms were clean, though a bit dated.
 • The value for the price was reasonable.

 Final Thoughts

While the staff left a great impression and the hotel had good bones, the distance from town, noise issues, and a few strange charges made us rethink if we'd stay here again. If proximity to Hoi An's main areas is important to you---or if you're expecting a clear beach view---you may want to explore other options.

Overall Rating: (3.75/5)

sample_comments.title: Pretty good.......but
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is as my title suggests, pretty good. But for a couple of things that would get it 4 stars. 
Checking in was easy and pretty quick. Staff at front desk were excellent, as are those throughout the hotel. All bright happy and smiling and very eager to help if required.
The restaurant and buffet is quite good with a good variety for local tastes, but could offer a little more for non-Asian guests. 
The pool and fitness centre were both good, although the pool is over chlorinated, meaning stinging eyes if you have them open while swimming. 
The rooms are a great size with a sofa and coffee table and great bathroom with walk-in shower and separate bath. Which bring me to my issue.......the shocking bed. Whilst its a king size, the one in our room had the worst mattress I've ever tried to sleep on. It should have been replaced a long time ago, due to collapsed springs which constantly squeaked and would wake my wife when I got in or out of bed. It was anything but comfortable and easily the worst mattress I've encountered in my travels through SE Asia. I'd like to think that this is a one off and that the beds in other room would be of a good standard, but I can only offer my opinions based on my experience, so who knows.
The shuttle bus to the Old City of Hoi An is great with 2 drop off times, but only one return pick up time. Whis I find a bit odd.
Would I recommend This hotel to friends? Probably, but with reservations as mentioned above.

sample_comments.title: Staff is cream of the crop

sample_comments.title: Great stay with scope for improvement
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is a perfect bang for the buck. The staff is very courteous and well mannered and always ready to help. Both Mr. Sec phuong and hieu were helpful. 

The location is good if you want to relax at the cua dai beach which is much less crowded than an bang beach and a 2 minute walk. The an bang beach is also only 5 mins away and offers more cafes and things to do. The old town is a 20 minute drive. The hotel operates a free shuttle/taxi service in morning and evening which is helpful. We used it once and the driver was very kind. The hotel also offered us a free one way airport drop which was amazing! 

However the sea view room is overlooking the marriot resort construction so only half of the view is sea and the other half is concrete. I think it'll stay this way for a long time till the resort is completed. 

The hotel offers a good breakfast buffet. The chef made a few vegetarian dishes especially for us which was a nice gesture. He also served fresh rice on our table personally so thanks a lot for that! There were cereals and fruits if you're a vegetarian. The hotel also offers beach towels and cycles for free. However there is less ventilation and no AC in the hall which is a little uncomfortable but not that noticeable. Overall a good stay if you're on a budget. If you want to explore the old town though, I wiuld suggest staying near there and coming to the beach for a single day. Much more convenient that way.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing stay
sample_comments.text:
Rooms - Rooms are spacious enough with comfortable beds and pillows. Fast and reliable internet.
Kids loved the spacious bathtub.

Location - A very short ride away from Old Town and close to beaches. The hotel also has a shuttle twice a day. Many convenience stores around to buy snacks, beer/wine, medicines etc.

View - The hotel's ocean view is not that great as it is set a bit away from the beach. Further this view is mostly obscured by an under construction Marriott resort.

Breakfast - A very uninspired selection for vegetarians/vegans - sad noodles and some sauteed veggies. Given how easy it is to custom make some Vietnamese dishes with tofu etc., the staff didn't seem to care much. 
We ended up carrying our own food at breakfast, so for vegetarians I'd save money and give their breakfast a skip.

sample_comments.text:
Good stay here. We arrived after dark and we're a bit concerned because there was NOTHING going on and there didn't seem to be any other guests (there were 2 other people only until a bus load arrived the next day). When we woke up the next day and explained we realised the hotel was actually pretty good! 
It's in between A Bang beach which is where most of the tourists stay and the old town. It costs about AU$4 to get a Grab in to the old town. 
The staff were absolutely gorgeous. So sweet and lovely and helpful. There was a particularly lovely lady in the restaurant and I'm kicking myself that I don't remember her name!
The pool is relaxed. The spa is great - we had massages there and it was really easy to book in. 
All in all it's in a quiet spot but you have access to the hotel pool and the pool clubs across the road (on the beachfront) which is pretty cool and it's a 5 min trip in to town.

There is a small cafe outside where you can rent bikes from.

sample_comments.title: CPSConsult Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates 252 A very friendly, welcoming, service orientated, small scale, personal 3.5* to 4* Hotel well located.
sample_comments.text:
Let me preface my review by stating categorically I would book & stay here again next time in Hoi An. 

Namely thanks to all the wonderful staff with their amazing guest-centric service. The staff's desire to please guests & meet all needs is remarkable. 

Alas, yet again another example of a Vietnamese hotel ownership over-hyping, over-promising, over-rating, over-pledging what is actually a wonderful small, friendly & personal 3.5 Star to 4 Star Hotel as a supposed 5 Star establishment. 

Such misleading rating makes the job of the superb staff a difficult recovery job from check-in to check-out. 

The hotel is well positioned near the beach (one plot back from the beach front) with partial beach views. Full beach views from southern rooms. 

Just a 12 minute taxi to old Hoi An town or 25-35 minute gentle cycle depending on the route taken & peddle cadence. 

The rooms offer all any guest needs & are a decent size, well set out, nicely furnished with all the usual fixtures, fittings, wi-fi, entertainment electronics, mini-fridge, kettle & beverages of a 3.5-4* hotel. 

The air-conditioning is great, constant, quiet & fresh. The bathrooms are large with twin-headed showers & baths plus the usual toiletries of a 3.5-4* hotel. 

The common areas are naturally furnished & welcoming while the public areas are open-plan, pleasant & comfortable to relax in & meet visitors in. 

A good solid breakfast with a nice range of Asian & Western foods on offer including pastries, cereals, fruits, hot cooked meals & a variety of beverages including a number of different coffees which was a pleasant change from other 3-4* hotels in Vietnam. 

The complimentary bicycles were a super touch, very useful & a game changer. So useful to nip to surrounding tailors, cafes, beaches, restaurants, shops & a variety of cycle routes into the Old Town of Hoi An. 

The mid-sized courtyard swimming pool suffices & is a cool change from the humidity of Hoi An. 

Most of all the staff from doormen, chambermaids, maintenance, security, waitresses,, receptionists to supervisors onto management all make every guest feel very welcome indeed. 

We stayed 3 very comfortable nights & had a great time based at the Wyndham Garden Hotel which is a solid 3.5* & if the owners actually update their ancient home-equipped gym / fitness suite? Well then they could even squeeze up into the tourist 4* bracket. 

Thank you to all the great staff whom took so much time to try to make our stay the advertised 5* experience. 

Thanks to the very attentive reception team of Mr Luc who went out his way to assist with issues in the gym. Other receptionists Vy, Sunny & Linda to name a few. 

The great Security / Maintenance Manager Mr. Winter Dong & his team of doormen Phuong, Dein, Chong, Chau, Nima & others.

Waiter Mr. Binh who learned our names on day one! 

Tran & her management team who all showed enthusiasm to take on board feedback. 

A good stay indeed.

sample_comments.negatives: Zwar in der Nähe des Strandes, aber doch über die Straße. Etwas außerhalb des Ortszentrum, aber mit Shuttlebus gut geregelt.

sample_comments.title: Spring Break
sample_comments.text:
Our stay at Little Beach was lovely! The hotel is very nice; I love all of the lanterns everywhere and the beautiful wood. We ate in the restaurant several times. The breakfast buffet and omelet station was fantastic. Dinner was good and service was attentive. I had some trouble with the airlines, so the staff were very helpful, including Paul, the general manager. They were also very helpful with securing taxis to and from stations and old town.
The only drawback was the location of the sea. In order to go to the beach you had to take a shuttle bus about 10 minutes away. Or there was a beach club across the street, with a great pool, but the ocean was blocked by giant sand bags.
I would stay there again!

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Wir hatten ein Familienzimmer für 3 Personen. Die Zimmergröße war ausreichend. Das Zimmer gehörte mal renoviert, die Zimmertür klemmte, Badezimmertüre quietschte erheblich. Leider wurde das Zimmer erst nach 15:00 Uhr gereinigt. Das Frühstück war ausgezeichnet. Die Preise für das Essen im Hotelrestaurant war für vietnamesische Verhältnisse zu teuer. Hervorzuheben ist die Freundlichkeit des Personals, vor allem Sunny von der Rezeption und die Dame die für das Frühstück verantwortlich war. Da das Hotel nicht direkt am Strand liegt, kann der gegenüberliegende Beach Club genutzt werden. Der Strand und der Pool des Clubs ist sehr schön.

sample_comments.title: Good Services
sample_comments.text: Little Beach Hoi An is a beautiful, spacious and clean hotel, the staffs are very helpful and one of them - Liz is very nice.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Sind vor vier Jahren schon mal in dem Hotel gewesen, allerdings unter anderem Namen. Mit dem Personal von damals ist das Hotel nicht mehr zu vergleichen. Haben einen kostenlosen Shuttle zum Bahnhof erhalten. Die Möbel auf dem Balkon wurden auf Nachfrage gegen bequemere ausgetauscht, was wir sehr kulant fanden. Die Massagen sind auch zu empfehlen.
sample_comments.negatives: Wir haben festgestellt, dass nun überwiegend Reisegruppen dort unterbracht werden.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel for Family
sample_comments.text: Oriental Conceptual hotel. Well designed everything. All steps are so kind and Humorous. Hoian Oldtown is little bit far, but shuttle is going there evrytime. We have stayed in connected room, it was perfect for 4 people. Massage services also peacefully good. Every sing time was happy for our family.

sample_comments.title: Gut
sample_comments.positives:
Das Schwimmbad war klasse, perfekt für Relax ￼
Und die Projekte für Kinder waren klasse, die haben mir ganz gut gefallen ￼
sample_comments.negatives: Der Fitnessraum hat nach Pilzen gerochen ￼

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Tôi và gia đình luôn muốn trở lại đây, khách sạn sạch và đi lại rất thuận tiện, đội ngũ nhân viên thân thiện, nhiệt tình ... các món ăn Âu với tôi rất thích. Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời với cả gia đình tôi!!!

sample_comments.title: Tolles Hotel, aber zu weit weg von der Altstadt
sample_comments.positives: Tolles, sauberes und schön eingerichtetes Zimmer. Sehr nette Mitarbeiter, die sich um alles gekümmert haben. Poolbereich ganz schön, aber vor allem das Frühstücksbuffet war sehr gut. Die Lage ist gut, wenn man Strandnähe bevorzugt. Es gibt auch zwei mal täglich einen kostenlosen Shuttle zum Strand, wo Liegen und Handtücher vom Hotel gestellt werden.
sample_comments.negatives: Wir haben festgestellt, dass man doch die meiste Zeit in der Altstadt verbringen möchte und dort kommt man zu Fuß nicht hin vom Hotel aus und die Strecke ist nicht sonderlich schön mit dem Fahrrad. Ein Grab kostet zwar nicht viel, aber es läppert sich trotzdem bei mehreren Tagen und vor allem kostet es jedes Mal Zeit. Würden also im Zweifel eher eine Unterkunft in der Old Town empfehlen.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: Amazing pool, beautiful room. Not actually near the beach- shuttle bus required to get there. Breakfast was AMAZING.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Schönes, kleines Hotel. Zum Strand ist es nicht weit. 
Zimmer zur Meerseite sind lauter, da sie zur Straße liegen.

sample_comments.title: overall it was really nice. we got a free upgrade (somehow?) but the staff were so so accommodating!
sample_comments.text: they were so helpful and friendly. the beaches are nice and the room was beautiful. the pool is quite small but i would definitely come back.

sample_comments.title: Wir, Eltern und Töchter (17 und 16 Jahre) fühlten uns sehr wohl und hatten das perfekte Ende unseres Vietnam Urlaubs
sample_comments.positives: Gute Lage, der Strand schnell erreichbar, lockere und herzliche Hotelatmosphäre
sample_comments.negatives: Die Bar macht zu früh Schluss

sample_comments.title: Fantastic Hotel
sample_comments.text: We loved this hotel. The staff were fantastic and were the most attentive and friendliest we have ever experienced. You really felt like they were happy to have you stay. The hotel itself is lovely with a good buffet breakfast, pool etc. Our return flights were changed and our tickets were printed at no cost. One thing to bear in mind. We had booked a suite with an extra bed which had loads of room for our family of 2 adults and 2 children. However there was a 'window' from the bathroom into the bedroom with no blind which caused some issues with privacy. Over all it didn't deter from our stay and we hope to return there again.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Wir würden von Hoangh, Fahrer des Hotels, am Flughafen sehr zuverlässig, sicher und sehr freundlich abgeholt und auch nach Hue gefahren. Sehr gutes Frühstück, guter Shuttle und schöner Pool.
sample_comments.negatives: Leider schauten wir auf eine große Baustelle. Neue Matratzen wären schön.

sample_comments.title: Location is little bit far from the city.
sample_comments.text: Other things were very good for me.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Die Aussicht, die Geräumigkeit und die Sauberkeit des Zimmers, das Frühstück, die Nähe zum Strand
sample_comments.negatives: Nichts zu bemängeln

sample_comments.title: Great 4 night stay
sample_comments.text:
Stayed at Little Hoi Ann for a four day rest before flying back to Australia via Ho Chi Min City.

Hotel is well located between the beach and old Hoi An town. They provided hourly shuttle buses to the beach and the town (and return). Otherwise taxi to town is approx. AUD$7 - $9 one way. For approx. AUD$28 one way they also provide an airport shuttle to hotel from Danang airport and vice versa which is approx. 45 minute drive.

We had a room overlooking the beach which meant we faced east and got the early morning sunrise at 5.30'ish each morning. Our room did not have block out curtains so if you are a sleeper like me who prefers total darkness then be prepared for early morning awakenings - which probably isn't a bad thing as it makes you get up and out early before the day becomes hot. My preference would be for block out blinds in eastern facing rooms but that is my personal preference - otherwise totally enjoyed our stay.

We didn't visit their beach until the last day and now wished we had gone down earlier in our stay as it was very relaxing even if you didn't go for a swim as their is a beer garden/restaurant which you can laze back in and enjoy the ambiance. We did swim in the pool everyday which was clean and very relaxing

All in all a great way to prepare for a long trip back home

sample_comments.title: Wunderbar, wenn man dem Trubel der Altstadt entfliehen möchte
sample_comments.positives: Sehr nah am Strand, kostenloser Shuttle in die Altstadt, sehr nettes und zuvorkommendes Personal, schönes Ambiente, viele nette Lokale in der Gegend

sample_comments.title: Nice Peaceful Stay
sample_comments.text: The hotel is located little ways from Hoi An, an area that is currently being developed (don't mind the construction). We rented a scooter for the time we were there to get around easily. Nice quiet beach out front the hotel and lots of amenities around us. Everyone was very friendly and helpful. Beautiful buffet breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Hervorragendes Hotel
sample_comments.positives: Das Hotel hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Die Zimmer sowie das Badezimmer waren schön und groß. Große Auswahl beim Frühstücksbuffet und hilfsbereite Nitarbeiter. Schöner Pool und auch der Pool beim beach Club war nicht zu beanstanden. Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!
sample_comments.negatives: Einziger Minuspunkt war eine Kleinigkeit bei der Abreise: man monierte, dass der Wäschebeutel in unserem Zimmer fehle. Ein Witz - wir haben den nicht angerührt und er ist wahrscheinlich 0,0001 Cent wert. Noch dazu wird man beim Shopping schliesslich ausreichend mit Plastiktüten versorgt. Also no need. Hatte sich dann aber zügig erledigt. Scheint lt Internet eine relativ bekannte Masche zu sein.

sample_comments.title: Very Friendly
sample_comments.text: Nice and cosy. Shuttle service to old town and private beach came very handy. Perfect for a relaxing and slow paced sort of travel. Staff were great and helpful. Felt very welcomed. Would definitely come back again.

sample_comments.title: Freundlichkeit und Hilfsbereitschaft in jedem Bereich!
sample_comments.positives: Ganz klar als erstes zu nennen,das Personal. Alle waren sehr nett und hilfsbereit. Egal was, man hat immer versucht zu helfen. Danke für alles. Das Hotel ist sehr sauber und gepflegt.
sample_comments.negatives:
Der Ausblick, gegenüber einer Baustelle. Aber da kann das Hotel nicht s dafür.
Leider war das Frühstück nicht so gut für europäischen Geschmack.Es gab nur zwei Sorten Wurst und eine Sorte Käse.

sample_comments.negatives: Es ist nicht so viel drum herum, aber dafür kann das Hotel nichts.

sample_comments.text: It's very good for family trip

sample_comments.title: The cost performance was excellent, and it was incredibly comfortable.
sample_comments.text: Everything is really great except for the location and the view. The accommodation is comfortable, the staff is friendly, the breakfast is adequate, and the price is very cheap. However, it is a bit far from the city center. Still, they operate a shuttle, which helps reduce transportation costs. At first, it seemed small, but I became more satisfied with the accommodation as time went on. Thank you to the hotel staff for helping me have a good stay during my three nights.
sample_comments.room_type: Quadruple Family Room, Partial Ocean View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Sehr hilfsbereites Personal und tolles Frühstücksbuffet. Sehr guter Zimmerservice und in Strandnähe. Gemütliche Lage.
sample_comments.negatives: Überhöhte Preise von Taxiservice, Ausflüge und Massagen.

sample_comments.title: Excellent property close to beach and 20 mins away from the famous lantern street
sample_comments.text:
Rooms were spacious with attached balcony with partial ocean view. 
Overall property was neatly maintained.

Ms Lilly at the reception was so supportive and kind in giving all the necessary assistance.

Very good spread of breakfast.

Only one disappointment what we had was due to restaurant staff, three of our guest were not well so we requested for the takeaway and with prior approval we started packing, but the way restaurant staff started staring as if we were stealing something.

Rest all were fantastic.
Hope management will look into this and in future other guest may not have an awkward situation like we had.
sample_comments.room_type: Quadruple Family Room, Partial Ocean View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Das Personal war sehr nett und das Zimmer sehr schön! Man kann gratis den Bachclub gegenüber mitnutzen. Nachdem wir aber die meisten Strände in der Nähe abgefahren sind haben wir unseren Lieblingsstrand rechts vom Resort Victoria gefunden. Dort konnte man um nicht mal 2 € pro Person pro Tag liegen mit Schirm von einem kleinen Restaurant mieten. Wirklich traumhaft dort! Man kann sich gratis im Hotel Fahrräder ausleihen, zu diesem Strand sind es nicht mal 5 Minute mit dem Rad. Wir sind mehrmals hingefahren, der Strand war untertags beinahe leer( nur wenige Hotel Gäste vom Victoria Resort auf den vorderen Liegen) nur ab späten Nachmittag sind ein paar Einheimische gekommen. Haben eine wunderschöne Zeit dort verbracht!

sample_comments.title: A quieter place to enjoy
sample_comments.text: We really enjoyed the facilities, the room, breakfast and the quieter location just 4 km away from the old city. The staff are so wonderful here! We were not well and really enjoyed a few pool days here. Sweet garden setting.
sample_comments.room_type: Premier Suite, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Excellent

sample_comments.negatives: Wenig Platz draußen zum Frühstücken und am Pool (Meerblick über Baustelle aktuell)

sample_comments.title: Hoi an 's delightful hotel
sample_comments.text: Excellent traditional interior design. Very attentive staff and obliging. The massage was excellent . The demo cooking sessions were fun ! Enjoyed the experience
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Ocean or Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Für den Preis super Hotel auch mit europäischem Anspruch.
sample_comments.positives:
Sehr freundliches Personal. Besonders Sunny an der Rezeption. Für den Preis sehr gutes Hotel auch für Europäische Gäste die keine Rucksack-Reisende oder keine Studenten sind und ordentliche Zimmer wollen. Bestes Hotel bisher in der preiskategorie in Vietnam.
Nah am Strand.
Kostenlose Strandtücher.
sample_comments.negatives: Leider wird gegenüber ein neues Resort gebaut, daher tagsüber Baugeräusche Richtung Meer.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel with lovely staff
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is very clean and well maintained and the staff are very friendly. 
Sue was very helpful in facilitating a room change as I was disappointed with our view.
Pool was lovely, free bikes were great, breakfast was good , access to the Silk Beach Club (across the road) was much more enjoyable than the 'private beach' which is 3km away by hotel shuttle. Free foot massage a bonus- thanks Li
sample_comments.room_type: Premier Suite, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Eine angenehme Bleibe wenn man nich ruhesuchend ist
sample_comments.positives:
Grosses Frühstücksbuffet, frische Omeletts, Kaffeemaschine. Schönes Badezimmer, saubere Lacken. Täglicher Zimmerservice, alles tiptop.
Gratis Strandtücher und Fahrradverleih (nach Verfügbarkeit).
sample_comments.negatives:
Baustelle vor dem Haus. Wenigstens kein 24h Betrieb aber durchaus laut, auch am Strand!

Etwas weit von Hoi An Zentrum entfernt.

sample_comments.title: Lovely place
sample_comments.text: Friendly staff, decent food, great facilities, very clean. would stay again
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Ocean or Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Das Frühstück war fantastisch und reichhaltig.
Wenn wir einen Extrawunsch (weicheres Kissen) hatten, wurde es von den stets hilfsbereiten Angestellten sofort erfüllt. Die Toilette in der Lobby war zu jeder Zeit sauber und duftete.
sample_comments.negatives:
Die Kaffeemaschine zur selbst Zubereitung von Cappuccino etc war sehr langsam, aber es gab auch normalen Filterkaffee.
Ob das Zimmer tatsächlich 50qm hatte, wage ich zu bezweifeln.

sample_comments.title: Good stay
sample_comments.text: Nice boutique hotel. We booked the rooftop room with balcony facing the river and bathtub. During eve of Lunar Chinese New Year, we witnessed the best fireworks around the city from our balcony. It was simply awesome. Staff were polite and professional. Breakfast was extremely delicious!
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Rooftop Room, Riverside View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Schönes Hotel mit sehr freundlichem Personal

- Schöne Anlage
- Sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal
- Leckeres Frühstück 
- Strandnähe
- Flughafenservice
sample_comments.negatives: - Das Bett in unserem Zimmer war für unseren Geschmack zu weich.

sample_comments.title: A truly enjoyable stay
sample_comments.text: Beautifully designed rooms and a stylish hotel throughout. It was quiet, the bed was very comfortable, and I slept perfectly. The staff were genuinely kind and attentive, making everything easy and pleasant. Just a short walk to the ocean with a lovely beach, and the restaurant served delicious food.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe King Room, Garden/City View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Sehr sauberes und gepflegtes Hotel mit leckerem Frühstück in einer angenehmen Größe im Gegensatz zu den riesigen Bettenb
sample_comments.positives:
Selten einen so tollen Service erleben dürfen.
Wunderbare Yoga Class wurde angeboten! Danke.
Zweimal täglich kostenloser Shuttle nach Hoi an.
sample_comments.negatives:
Das Bett fanden wir unbequem, Matratze weich oder durchgelegen und die Kissen so dick, dass ich Nackenschmerzen bekommen habe. Aber das ist natürlich alles Geschmackssache...

Das Gym ist im Keller ohne Fenster und kein einladender Raum. Es roch teilweise sehr muffig und wir haben es nicht so genutzt wie gewünscht.

sample_comments.title: Good overall, nice breakfast. good coffe. warm and helpful staff
sample_comments.text: overall good trip. momy and aunty really enjoy the room and the benefit that come with. 1 way transportation was useful. and my family was the only group go to Hoi An in the day. so we get the whole car to ourself. very comfortable. the room i booked had limited view to the ocean so be aware. i shared with them that we visit Hoi An to celebrate family birthday. and they gave us 2 welcome cakes. Love it!

sample_comments.title: Eine Oase der Entspannung mit hervorragendem Personal
sample_comments.positives: Das Personal war unglaublich freundlich und zuvorkommend. Sunny von der Rezeption stand uns bei allen Fragen hilfreich zur Seite. Danke dafür. Das Hotel liegt in Strandnähe und man kann kostenlos den Beachclub auf der anderen Straßenseite nutzen. Das Zimmer war sauber und geräumig, das Bad mit Dusche und Badewanne ausgestattet. Außerdem waren kostenlos Bademäntel verfügbar. Das Frühstück war sehr umfangreich, Saft , Obst, warme und kalte Speisen, Joghurt, sogar Eiskaffee war vorhanden. Im Frühstücksraum war auch ausreichend groß, so das man immer einen Platz gefunden hat. Das Hotel bietet kostenlos Fahrräder an und zudem 2x täglich einen Shuttle nach Hoi An. Da wir den Aufenthalt eher zum entspannen als zum Sightseeing nutzen wollten, war die Entfernung zur Stadt (4km) kein Problem. Das Hotel hat einen Spa- und einen Sportbereich, beides haben wir aufgrund der Kürze des Aufenthaltes nicht genutzt. >Wir haben uns rundherum wohlgefühlt und können das Hotel uneingeschränkt empfehlen.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel with exceptional staf
sample_comments.text: The staff are the friendliest we have encountered in all of Vietnam, they all go out of their way to make sure that we are all happy. The rooms are great and breakfast has a good variety. We love the free shuttle buses and also the beach restaurant that is linked with the hotel. We also liked the free bicycles

sample_comments.negatives: Kein echter Zugang zum Meer. Man hatte die Möglichkeit kostenfrei in den Beachclub gegenüber ins Meer zugehen. Kein schöner Strand!

sample_comments.title: Very good place to stay.
sample_comments.text: My 2nd time there, very good room, great staff, very good breakfast, excellent value for money spent.

sample_comments.title: Schöne Zimmer, gute Lage.
sample_comments.positives:
Das Hotel ist sehr empfehlenswert. Die Lage war für uns optimal, da es direkt am Meer liegt, einen schönen Pool und kostenlosen Strandzugang beim Strandclub (Pool und Liegen) hat, in unmittelbarer Nähe sind diverse Restaurants.
Wir konnten kostenfrei Fahrräder ausleihen um die nähere Gegend zu erkunden.
Sehr guter Service, riesige Auswahl beim Frühstück. Zimmer sind elegant & modern, aber auch klassisch zugleich. Auch das Freizeitangebot mit Pool, Gym, Massage und Shuttle wussten wir zu schätzen.
Es werden im Hotel Shuttles angeboten um nach Hoi An Altstadt zu fahren, zurück geht es relativ früh, daher haben wir immer ein Grab Taxi genommen.
Wir können es 100%ig empfehlen!

sample_comments.title: We will be back
sample_comments.text: Third time here. Staff were very welcoming! We would be happy to be back!!!
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room, Garden/City View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Erholsam
sample_comments.positives: Schönes, liebevoll gepflegtes Hotel, geräumiges Zimmer mit geräumigem Bad, angenehmer Pool. Wir hatten nur eine Nacht gebucht und haben direkt auf drei verlängert.
sample_comments.negatives: Das Hotel liegt weder am Strand (6 Minuten mit dem Taxi zum A Bang Beach), noch in der Innenstadt (15 Minuten mit dem Taxi zur Old Town Hoi An). Uns hat das nicht gestört, im Gegenteil, wir waren sogar froh darüber, dass wir eine etwas ruhigere Lage hatten.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
Value for money, free bycicles, umbrellas etc. Quiet location. Beach club in three kilometers far. Free shuttle services to beach and to Hoi An market. 
Hotel is small enough, but staff and amenities are good. 
I will definitely recommend this hotel to those who want to spend quiet time in Da Nang.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: super gepflegt und super sauber.
sample_comments.negatives: Der „eigene Strand" war sehr weit entfernt. Das hätte man vorher schreiben können. Beim Frühstück hätte es nochmal 2 Sorten Wurst und Käse mehr geben können.

sample_comments.title: Suitable for relaxation.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is conveniently located right by Cua Dai beach. The rooms are spacious and clean, but the downside is that the bed and mattress make creaking sounds when you get on them. The breakfast is delicious and varied.
sample_comments.room_type: Family Room, 2 Queen Beds, Balcony, Partial Ocean View (Quadruple)

sample_comments.title: Ausgezeichnet, jederzeit würde ich dieses Hotel buchen
sample_comments.positives: Sehr tolles, nicht zu großes Hotel. Ruhig gelegen und 3x täglich einen kostenlosen Shuttle zum Strand und in die Altstadt von Hoi An

sample_comments.title: 16 nights of bliss
sample_comments.text: Hotel is very comfortable and staff are super helpful and friendly. Free pick up from the airport. Room was large and comfortable as was the bed. Beach is about 40 meters across the road. Breakfast has reasonable choice buffet style with an omelette station. Pool was quite small but most people head to the beach anyway which has a swim up bar in silk club and cheap drinks during the day. The sea and beach are gorgeous. It's our first time but won't be the last! Free shuttle to Hoi an but taxis are so cheap it's not an issue. Thank you to the staff see you again soon!
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe King Room, Garden/City View, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Die Sauberkeit

sample_comments.title: Great staff, beach, great breakfast
sample_comments.text: This is not by the city center but they take you there so you just need to pay for a Grab to return. Wonderful breakfast, linens, bed and personal care. Loved Lily and Sunny, great Spa too. Silk Beach club good too.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Rooftop Room, Riverside View, Balcony

Lots of shops and restaurants in a very short walk. Pool is fine, internet is reliable. Breakfast buffet is good and varied. 
Restaurant and bar prices are quite expensive, even in the happy hour.

Good place, near beach and far from crowded old quarter Hoi An. 
Spent 4 nights here and will come back again. 
The only minus point (from my view) is breakfast almost the same everyday.

Die Mitarbeiter der Reception sind äußerst hilfsbereit und freundlich und lösen einfach jedes Problem mit der jeweiligen Diskretion mit einem zauberhaften Lächeln im Gesicht. Immer wieder sehr sehr gern hier!

sample_comments.title: Sehr schöner, erholsamer, sehr empfehlenswerter Aufenthalt
sample_comments.positives: Stilvolles Ambiente, schöner Pool - Gartenanlage, nah zum Strand, tolle Unterstützung durch Personal bei Buchungen von Touren, Motoroller; kostenloser Fahradverleih

sample_comments.title: good value for the money
sample_comments.text:
decent location near the beach, quiet at night, friendly staff, large bathroom with big bathtub that fit 2 easily, huge bed (2x120cm wide fitted together) free bicycle, free airport transfer (1 trip free, the other trip is 350k vnd which is normal price for the area) nearby an bang beach. 15 mins by motor vehicle to hoi an old town. the staff are nice, massage is good, hotel overall in good condition, clean. the breakfast options a bit sparse. but there are many little cafés nearby 
Would recommend.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Der Service war herausragend, Sunny und das ganze Personal waren immer aufmerksam und sehr hilfsbereit. Das Frühstück war lecker. Die Lage war ruhig und es gab einen Shuttle Service zum Strand und in die Stadt.

sample_comments.title: Fantastic hotel & staff
sample_comments.text: Previous reviews have said it all and that's why I chose Wyndham Garden & we weren't disappointed. The staff are all fantastic, very welcoming and keen to make your stay as good as possible. Breakfast buffet and meals in general are really quite good, with various dishes including the daily soup, being changed daily for breakfast. A large selection of foods, i doubt anyone could complain. The hotel only being a 5 min walk away from Silk Club, which hotel guests have free access to, is really good, with a bar, pool, deck chairs & beach, is great. The hotel pool is quite good, as it's shaded for a lot of the day, so the water is pleasant. Only 10 mins from old town and free shuttle twice a day. I'd find it hard to not stay here again on our visit. Highly recommended.

sample_comments.title: Super
sample_comments.positives: Nettes Hotel, vor allem das personal super freundlich und hilfsbereit, das Frühstück buffet sehr vielfältig

sample_comments.title: Our stay at the Wyndham
sample_comments.text: Overall really nice stay , would have sat around the pool area much more but the drinks were more than double the price of the bars a few metres away , good breakfast but gets overrun with one night stay coach parties , shame about a huge construction site directly over the road , would like to have been informed of this , saying this we would stay here again
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Die Anlage liegt direkt am Meer und bietet einen kostenlosen Zugang zum Beachclub, wo man den Pool und die Liegen nutzen kann. Die Anlage ist sehr sauber und bietet eine gemütliche Atmosphäre. Das Frühstück ist abwechslungsreich und sehr gut, mit einer großen Auswahl. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Ein weiteres Plus ist der kostenlose Flughafen-Shuttle.
sample_comments.negatives: Wer nicht vorhat, am Meer zu entspannen, sollte besser eine Unterkunft im Stadtzentrum buchen, da die Fahrt dorthin etwa 20-30 Minuten dauert.

sample_comments.title: Lovely hotel
sample_comments.text:
Very well appointed, great staff, nice pool, very good breakfast. 
It's across the road from the beach. They have a shuttle that goes daily to the main beach area and then to the old city. The staff are very professional, Sunny at the desk was very helpful.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Der 1. Eindruck war bereits sehr gut. Das Personal war sehr hilfsbereit und zuvorkommend. Man kommt rein und fühlt sich gleich wohl. Sunny, Lily und Thomas sind uns besonders positiv in Erinnerung, wie gesagt sehr hilfsbereit und aufmerksam. Als wir ein Problem außerhalb des Hotels hatten, war es wiederum Sunny und speziell die Managerin Yummy, die uns aus der Patsche geholfen haben. Zu guter Letzt war es Minh, der uns gefahren hat und ebenfalls sehr nett und zuvorkommend war. Alles top im Hotel, Service, Zimmer und Frühstück!

sample_comments.title: Bit out of town but nice hotel
sample_comments.text: It's a very good hotel and food was great. Bit away from the hoi an old town but a good huge hotel

sample_comments.title: Unser Aufenthalt in dieser Urlaubsoase war traumhaft und wir haben uns sehr sehr wohl gefühlt!!!
sample_comments.positives: Die Lage des Hotels war optimal. Etwas ausserhalb von Hoi An, trotzdem mit dem Taxi in ca 10 Minuten mittendrin. Daher ruhig und abseits vom Trubel. Über eine wenig befahrene Straße erreicht man den Beachclub mit wunderschönem Pool und den traumhaften Sandstrand von Cua Dai mit Liegestühlen und Strandrestaurants. Das Frühstücksbüffet ließ keine Wünsche offen, das Personal immer und überall zur Stelle, so reizend, hilfsbereit und herzlich! In den Zimmern war es ruhig, moderne Badausstattung, alles sehr sauber.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: ２０２５年２月に５０㎡のプレミアスイートに１泊あたり邦貨１００００円ほどで６泊した。スイートとあるが、ベッドルームとリビングが分かれているわけではなく、広めのシティングスペースのあるタイプの部屋だった。黒檀を基調とする高級感のあるインテリアで居室の居心地はいい。コロニアル風の建物の小ぢんまりしたホテルでわかりやすいく豪華なわけではないが、一通りの設備が整い品良くまとまっている。オン・ザ・ビーチではないが、道を隔てた場所にあるビーチクラブが無料で利用でき、プライベートビーチ気分も味わえる。スタッフは皆親切で気が回り、気分良く滞在することができた。朝食時のレストランの賑わいからすると、それ以外の時間は驚くほど人が少なく、ホテルのプールは貸し切り状態で使えることもあった。団体客の受け入れをしており、そういった時にぶつかると、騒々しいのだが、彼らが長居することはないようで、すぐにまた落ち着きを取り戻す。華やかな演出には欠けるが、ゆったりとくつろぐにはいいホテルだと感じた。
sample_comments.response:

Thank you for choosing to stay at Wyndham Garden Hoi An and sharing your amazing experience with us!

We are truly delighted to receive your glowing feedbacks on your recent stay experience with us. Our main goal is to elevate each of our guest stay experience with us and we are extremely happy we managed to fulfill this goal with you. We will share your great feedbacks with our team and I'm sure they will be as motivated and inspired as much as I am.

Once again, thank you very much for sharing your experience with us and we look forward to welcoming you back again when you next visit this beautiful place.

Yours sincerely,
Steven Tran
On behalf of the Management
Wyndham Garden Hoi An Cua Dai Beach

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Was uns gefallen hat? Einfach alles. Der Aufenthalt in diesem Hotel wird durch liebenswerten Damen der Rezeption, Yummy, Sunny and Lyly, zu einem unvergesslichen Trip. Alle privaten Problemchen wurden von diesen mit Hingabe gelöst, man fühlt sich rundum einfach wohl.
Auch im Restaurant wird professionell gearbeitet und Frau Stella kümmert sich um alles
sample_comments.negatives: Ein Zimmer mit Poolblick wäre ruhiger als ein Zimmer mit Naturblick

sample_comments.title: Very comfortable stay
sample_comments.text: Breakfast is not meant for Vegetarian Indians. Rest everything was excellent. The hotel provided free pick up from Da nang airport.
